confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Leaflet marker iconUrl not set under Turbopack
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Added explicit L.icon via map-icons.ts with stable CDN URLs passed to Marker.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Map tiles rendered as broken chunks under Tailwind preflight
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Reset Leaflet img max-width rules in globals.css and fixed map container height.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Open-Meteo reverse geocoding endpoint returns 404
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Switched map click reverse lookup to Nominatim with coordinate fallback and synced city search on external selection.

residualRisks: Nominatim usage policy requires conservative client-side request volume.
Map marker CDN icons depend on unpkg availability.
